name: Corbado
description: List users and their registered passkey credentials through the Corbado Backend API.

auth.hint: Use the Corbado project ID as the Basic-auth username and the API secret as the password. Keep the credential pair in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List project users with optional status, identifier, sorting, and pagination filters.

params.name: userID
params.description: Exact user identifier in usr-<number> format; cannot be combined with userIDs.

params.name: identifierValue
params.description: Exact email, phone, or username value; provide identifierType with this filter.

params.name: identifierType
params.description: Identifier type for identifierValue: email, phone, or username.

params.name: status
params.description: User status: active, pending, disabled, or deleted.

params.name: sort
params.description: Creation-time sort: +created for ascending or -created for descending.

params.name: includeIdentifiers
params.description: Whether to include login identifiers; defaults to true.

tools.name: list_user_passkeys
tools.description: List passkey credentials registered for a project user.

params.name: sort
params.description: Field and direction in fieldName:asc or fieldName:desc form; supported fields include created, status, backupState, browserName, and osName.
